name: Cantalope Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 5 oz vanilla pudding mix - cook n serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a 10-inch pie plate, combine vanilla wafer crumbs and melted butter. Press the mixture into the pie plate, forming a slight edge around the rim. Bake for 8-10 minutes until lightly browned; remove from the oven and let cool on a rack.
3. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, prepare the pudding mix according to the label instructions, using only 2 1/2 cups of milk. Set aside.
4. Drain cantaloupe pieces well on paper towels and cut into chunks. Stir the chunks into the pudding mixture. Cover the surface of the pudding mixture with plastic wrap and refrigerate for about 30 minutes or until set.
5. Whip the cream and fold it into the chilled pudding mixture. Spoon the filling into the crust and refrigerate until set, about 6-8 servings.
